name: The Proof-Halls
descriptionSeed: Every argument the Syllogists have ever made, kept, in order, with its errors annotated by the people who made them. The Proof-Halls are an intellectual monument and a two-thousand-year exercise in public humility: every wrong turn is preserved, signed, and taught.
encounterFlavor: Scholars who will show you their own worst mistake with something like pride; a proof half-finished for a century; an argument here that touches something the Verists say plainly and the Syllogists have not yet been able to derive.
questSeeds: A proof in the Halls has been quietly altered, and altering a proof is the worst crime this people has
A visiting Threnodist has said one sentence that a hall full of Syllogists cannot refute and cannot accept
